title: Retired JavaScript Inventory Policy
content_html:
Retired JavaScript Inventory Policy

This policy document has been retired.

Use Studio Risk Analysis Policy for the active general, frontend, and backend risk-analysis policy.

Current frontend evidence remains in:

  • Javascript Inventory
  • Docs Viewer JavaScript Inventory

Current backend evidence remains in:

  • Studio Python And Ruby Script Inventory

The old studio-javascript-payload-inventory doc_id is preserved only so existing links resolve to this retirement notice.
